---
title: "Tableros ganadores — HackODS UNAM 2026"
subtitle: "Las 20 narrativas visuales más destacadas del primer hackatón de la UNAM"
page-layout: full
---

## 🏆 Podio

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🥇 [LinuxitOS](https://hackods.github.io/HackODS2026_linuxitOS/)

<div class="tablero-embed">
  <iframe src="https://hackods.github.io/HackODS2026_linuxitOS/" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🥈 [Trio Tristeza](https://hackods.github.io/HackODS2026_TrioTristeza/)

<div class="tablero-embed">
  <iframe src="https://hackods.github.io/HackODS2026_TrioTristeza/" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🥉 [Abejas Astutas](https://hackods.github.io/HackODS2026_AbejasAstutas/)

<div class="tablero-embed">
  <iframe src="https://hackods.github.io/HackODS2026_AbejasAstutas/" loading="lazy"></iframe>
</div>
:::

:::

## Finalistas

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/bladerunners.png" alt="Bladerunners" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Bladerunners**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/codigo-guinda.png" alt="Código Guinda" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Código Guinda**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/datofilods.png" alt="DatofilODS" loading="lazy">
</a>
**DatofilODS**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/derre.png" alt="DERRE" loading="lazy">
</a>
**DERRE**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/emprendeia.png" alt="EmprendeIA" loading="lazy">
</a>
**EmprendeIA**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/huerfanitosutm.png" alt="HuerfanitosUTM" loading="lazy">
</a>
**HuerfanitosUTM**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/linuxitos.png" alt="linuxitOS" loading="lazy">
</a>
**linuxitOS**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/lobo-ensambladores.png" alt="Lobo Ensambladores" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Lobo Ensambladores**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/mareadedatods.png" alt="MareaDeDatODS" loading="lazy">
</a>
**MareaDeDatODS**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/patosclimaticods.png" alt="PatosClimaticODS" loading="lazy">
</a>
**PatosClimaticODS**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/pcaboys.png" alt="PCABoys" loading="lazy">
</a>
**PCABoys**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/pumatecnicos.png" alt="Pumatécnicos" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Pumatécnicos**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/tlamatipohua.png" alt="Tlamatipohua" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Tlamatipohua**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/trio-tristeza.png" alt="Trío tristeza" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Trío tristeza**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/typers.png" alt="Typers" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Typers**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/upiit-machine.png" alt="UPIIT Machine" loading="lazy">
</a>
**UPIIT Machine**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6 .g-col-md-4 .g-col-lg-3}
<a class="tablero-thumb" href="https://jjallaire.github.io/gapminder-dashboard/" target="_blank">
  <img src="img/tableros/voces-ods-2030.png" alt="Voces ODS 2030" loading="lazy">
</a>
**Voces ODS 2030**
:::

:::
